name: Townhouse Oak near Tugu Simpang Lima formerly GM Inn Hotel

reviews.originalComment: GM inn hotel syariah: Good kebersihan, kenyamanan tempat tidur, fungsi fasilitas (AC, Wi-Fi, shower), dan desain interior. Kamarnya suka bangett rapi, tenang, dan memiliki staf ramah. Mr: Nasrul dan Bg: Ahlul👍 Tipe kamar berkisar dari standar hingga suite atau penthouse dengan harga dan fasilitas yang disesuaikan. Dan di pusat kota.. kemana-mana dekat banget buat kuliner. Pokonya 👍🫶
reviews.reviewComments: GM Inn Syariah Hotel: Good cleanliness, comfort of the bed, functionality of facilities (AC, Wi-Fi, shower), and interior design. The rooms are very tidy, quiet, and have friendly staff. Mr. Nasrul and Mr. Ahlul👍 Room types range from standard to suites or penthouses with prices and facilities adjusted accordingly. And it's located in the city center.. very close to everywhere for culinary delights. Overall 👍🫶

reviews.originalComment: Hotel terbaik dengan harga 100rb-an, kamar bersih, kasur lebar dan empuk, selimut nyaman, ac dingin, kamar mandi luas, air kencang, hanya minus air panas, ad lift, pokok-a recommended...
reviews.reviewComments: The best hotel with a price around 100,000, clean rooms, wide and soft beds, comfortable blankets, cold air conditioning, spacious bathroom, strong water flow, only missing hot water, has an elevator, definitely recommended...

reviews.originalComment:
Rekomendasi banget, 
Pelayanan superrrr
Kamar nya bersih, 
Kalau ke banda mending disini, 
Pusat kota, 
Kemana-mana gampang
🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
Menyalaaaa 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥
reviews.reviewComments:
Highly recommended,  
Super service  
The room is clean,  
If you're in Banda, it's better to stay here,  
City center,  
Easy to go anywhere  
🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩  
Amazing 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

reviews.originalComment: Cocok untuk keluarga bisa satu kamar semua dan ada fasilitas lift nya jadi gk cape turun naik tangga, Good Hotel
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for families, as all rooms are together and there is a lift facility, so no need to get tired going up and down the stairs, Good Hotel.

reviews.originalComment:
Super nyaman bersih dan mewah, next bakalan ke sini lagi,rekomen deh penginapan untuk yang mau holiday atau acara lainnya🥰❤️
Dekat kemana2
reviews.reviewComments: Super comfortable, clean, and luxurious, will definitely come back here again, highly recommend this accommodation for those who want to holiday or for other events. 🥰❤️ Close to everything.

reviews.originalComment: Luar biasa Hotel, Keren, pelayanan super ramah dan sopan, kebersihan oke dan ada lift utk akses ke lantai atas, free fitnes thank you b.Nasrol dan b. Ahlul...
reviews.reviewComments: Amazing hotel, cool, super friendly and polite service, cleanliness is okay and there is an elevator for access to the upper floors, free fitness thank you Mr. Nasrol and Mr. Ahlul...

reviews.originalComment:
Puas bangett.. ada lift juga jadi ga capek naik turun tangga.
Next mau nginap disini lagi insyaallah
reviews.reviewComments: Very satisfied.. there is also a lift so I don't get tired of going up and down the stairs. Next, I want to stay here again, God willing.

reviews.originalComment:
Lokasi berada di pusat kota, ya sesuai harga, saya dapat pintu kamarmandi yg nggak ada kuncinya.
Untuk lainya ok.
reviews.reviewComments: The location is in the city center, yes according to the price, I got a bathroom door that doesn't have a lock. Other than that, it's okay.

Waktu kesini pertama pesan dengan tipe kamar yang sama masih puas ,makanya pesen lagi eh sekarang bener bener mengerikan kamarnya, kamar mandi ada semacam cacing cacing kecil dilantai, kamar mandi ga bersih, pintu kamar mandi gaada kuncinya, tv gabisa, bantal tipis, ga recommended untuk kesini padahal ini saya kesini untuk kedua kalinya

reviews.originalComment: Mohon disinkronkan kembali antara aplikasi agodanya dengan fakta di lapangan,booking tapi kamar sudah habis
reviews.reviewComments: Please synchronize the Agoda application with the actual situation, booking but the rooms are already full.
Sudah 2kali ke aceh stay disini. Lokasi dekat tempat makandan kopi enak. Sangat recommended
Bagus sekali mantap
Kamar nya masih kurang bersih, karena di sudut kamar nya masih ada sarang Laba-laba.
Sangat memuaskan
Semua ngga di sediakan, sabun sampo sikat gigi odol . Mati lampu 😖
Pelayanan baik dan ramah.
Pihak staff hotel meminta tambahan sebesar 50ribu
Hotel nyaman dan bersih serta pelayanan ramah dan sangat membantu, Terima Kasih GM inn
Nyamn untuk klwrga
Nice temptnya.tapi wifinya saja kurang tidak bsa untuk lantai 3🙏
Saya menginap 3 malam disini, aman dan nyaman hotelnya
Penginapan nya bersih dan nyaman
Tempatnya enak dan bersih
Dipusat kota
Kebersihan oke, pelayanan oke dekat dengan kuliner, mudah akses ke lokasi hotel
Sangat memuaskan
Hotel yang nyaman dan bersih serta pelayanan yang ramah

Bersih 
Wangi 
Pelayan bagus
Pusat kota
